title: Abnormalities
description: A bit of mods and a vanilla feel, a recipe for a good time?
body:
**Abnormalities** is a modpack built around vanilla-style mods! Containing all vanilla+ mods like Team's Abnormals, Windswept, Peculiars and some additional ones, it is designed to complement and enhance the vanilla gameplay, making it more rewarding and fun, while improving the game's performance.

![AncientTeam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eca259ccb21523229f017be3ddcab76b26e2c49_0.webp)
